creator: swell.k@gmail.com
text:
Prune obsolete dependencies in Xserver: trapproto[1], xf86miscproto[2].
They were removed before 1.6, making the change applicable to both new
and old xorg-server.

[1] http://cgit.freedesktop.org/xorg/xserver/commit/?id=cbc20d9
[2] http://cgit.freedesktop.org/xorg/xserver/commit/?id=22e6410

Fix: patch against xorg-dev repo

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: http://redports.org/~aoeui/20120102051859-54660-2203/xorg-server-1.7.7_3,1.log
